src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update LiquibaseProperties import path to match Spring Boot 3.2+ package structure.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed event.getMarker() check to event.getMarkerList() and added null/empty checks.

Replace deprecated Environment.acceptsProfiles with Environment.matchesProfiles for profile checking.
Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson to align with the new Jackson distribution used in the target framework version.
